_note: More biblical figures hung off people already in the tree. Moses/Aaron/Miriam via Levi->Kohath->Amram (Exodus 6:16-20). Joseph's sons Ephraim & Manasseh (Gen 41). Lot's sons Moab & Ben-Ammi, ancestors of the Moabites & Ammonites (Gen 19:37-38). Judah's other sons Er, Onan, Shelah (by Bathshua) and Zerah (Perez's twin, by Tamar), Gen 38. Explicit dates so nothing is date-poisoned. Sorts after 07j; Levi/Joseph/Lot/Judah/Tamar exist.
